description: Samson S-Patch Plus 48-point TRS patchbay. Half-normalled: top flows to bottom when no cable inserted.

bus_pre_insert.notes: FX6 ANGEL (Mesa-style) for lead; FX1 DELUXE (Fender) available for rhythm

electric.notes: Bus 5 muted by default; unmute Bus 5 and mute Bus 6 to enable electric mode

acoustic.notes: Bus 6 active by default; receives from Ch2 and Ch6 (condenser mics)

send.notes: Bus 2 receives from Bus 5 + Bus 6; no pre-insert on Bus 2

recording_bus.name: Mic Rec
recording_bus.notes: USB 5/6 OFF by default — enable when recording condensers

acoustic_mic.notes: Bus 4 sends stereo condenser mics to P9 (L) and P10 (R). Ch6 (Gtr Ac Mics) receives LCL/3+4 and sends to Bus 6. Muted by default.

reamp.name: Re-amp Out
reamp.notes: Re-amp output: Ch18 (Guitar Processed) → USR/8 → USB Out 3 → Loopback → Model 12 Track 3. MUST be turned OFF after re-amping to prevent feedback loop.

reverb.notes: Shared reverb return. Bus 1 and Bus 2 send to Bus 3. Bus 3 assigned to Main 1.

13.name: Tape Playback
13.source_detail: Model 12 USB Stereo Out L+R (internal main mix) → Loopback → Wing USB In 3-4
13.notes: Returns the Model 12 internal mix (all MTR playback tracks) to the Wing for overdub monitoring. Fader at -18dB for noise floor management — USB-mode tracks on the Model 12 re-broadcast their input signal back into the stereo mix. No feedback loop as long as Wing USB outputs only carry dry recording tracks (USB 1, 2) and all other Model 12 tracks are in MTR mode. USB 3 (re-amp) must be OFF when not in use. Speakers must be muted (/mtx/1/mute i 1) during open-mic tracking.

5.name: Gtr Acoustic DI
5.notes: Clean DI tap from Ch2 via USR/5 PRE. Bypasses all outboard. Muted by default — unmute when a clean DI reference or direct blend is needed.

6.name: Gtr Ac Mics
6.notes: Stereo condensers via XLR direct (phantom power on). NOT on main — signal flows through Bus 6 to Bus 2 to outboard. Must be unmuted for mic signal to flow.
